title: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
summary_full: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.
summary_public: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war fuels inflation worries...elevated oil prices
